deviations.what: the sample opens a sap.m.MessageBox from its controller; there is no such control in the view. It is mapped to abap2UI5's client->message_box_display, driven by two buttons wired to events.
the buttons' ariaHasPopup="Dialog" is dropped (available only since UI5 1.84).
the MessageBox emphasizedAction / dependentOn options of the original are dropped (available only since UI5 1.75 / 1.124).
